title: Senior Data Scientist
description: We are looking for a Senior Data Scientist to join our AI team. You will design and implement machine learning models, work with large datasets, and deploy solutions to production. You will collaborate with cross-functional teams and mentor junior data scientists. Required skills include Python, TensorFlow, PyTorch, SQL, Pandas, NumPy, and Scikit-learn. Experience with distributed computing frameworks like Spark and cloud platforms (AWS or GCP) is preferred. Strong communication and leadership skills required.

title: Full Stack Web Developer
description: Seeking a Full Stack Web Developer with strong expertise in React and Node.js. Responsibilities include building scalable web applications, designing RESTful APIs, writing unit and integration tests, and working in an Agile environment. Experience with cloud deployment on AWS or GCP is a plus. You will work closely with designers and product managers to deliver high-quality user experiences. TypeScript and Next.js knowledge is highly valued.

title: NLP Engineer
description: Looking for an NLP Engineer to design and build state-of-the-art natural language processing systems. You will work on text classification, named entity recognition, machine translation, and conversational AI. Familiarity with transformer architectures, BERT, and fine-tuning pre-trained models (HuggingFace) is required. You will also be responsible for model evaluation, deployment using FastAPI, and performance monitoring in production.

title: DevOps Engineer
description: We need a DevOps Engineer to manage our cloud infrastructure on AWS, automate CI/CD pipelines, and ensure system reliability. You will work with Docker, Kubernetes, and Terraform. Monitoring, alerting with Prometheus and Grafana, and incident response are key responsibilities. Experience with GitLab CI or GitHub Actions and Infrastructure as Code is essential. Bash scripting and Linux system administration are required.

title: Machine Learning Engineer
description: Join our team as an ML Engineer to build, train, and deploy machine learning models at scale. You will work on recommendation systems, fraud detection, and predictive analytics. Strong Python skills combined with machine learning expertise are required. Experience with MLOps, model serving frameworks (FastAPI, ONNX), and cloud platforms is a big advantage. Familiarity with distributed training using PyTorch and Spark is preferred.

title: Python Backend Developer
description: We are hiring a Python Backend Developer to build high-performance APIs and microservices. You will work with Django or FastAPI, PostgreSQL, Redis, and Celery. The role involves designing RESTful and GraphQL APIs, writing comprehensive pytest suites, and participating in code reviews. Docker and Kubernetes experience is required. Experience with async Python (asyncio) and message queues like Kafka is a plus.

title: Data Analyst
description: Looking for a Data Analyst to derive actionable insights from large datasets. You will build dashboards using Tableau and Power BI, write complex SQL queries, perform statistical analysis, and present findings to business stakeholders. Experience with A/B testing, KPI reporting, and ETL pipelines is essential. Python or R for data manipulation using Pandas is required. Google Analytics and BigQuery experience is a plus.

title: Frontend Developer
description: Hiring a Frontend Developer skilled in React and TypeScript to build highly interactive web applications. You will collaborate with UI/UX designers using Figma, implement pixel-perfect components, optimize for performance and accessibility, and write Jest and React Testing Library unit tests. Experience with Next.js for SSR, Tailwind CSS, and Redux Toolkit is preferred. Strong understanding of responsive design and web accessibility (WCAG) standards is required.

title: QA Automation Engineer
description: We need a QA Automation Engineer to build and maintain automated test suites using Selenium and Cypress. You will perform API testing with Postman, write BDD tests using Cucumber, and do performance testing with JMeter. You will work in an Agile team using JIRA for bug tracking and test management. Experience with CI/CD integration for test pipelines is required. Python or Java scripting skills are essential.

title: UI/UX Designer & Developer
description: Seeking a UI/UX Designer who can also code. You will own the complete user experience lifecycle from research and wireframing in Figma to delivering production-ready HTML, CSS, and React components. Strong visual design skills including typography, color theory, and design systems are required. You will conduct usability testing sessions, create user personas, and iterate designs based on user feedback. Accessibility standards (WCAG) must be followed throughout.
